title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class language model that tops benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model is capable of vision tasks, long-context reasoning, and demonstrates performance on code generation, fullstack development, and CAD applications.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class language model that tops benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. It documents the model's vision capabilities and long-context reasoning, alongside performance on code generation, fullstack development, and CAD applications. The takeaway: Fable 5 is positioned as a benchmark leader spanning both coding and multimodal tasks.
